scripts.build: npm run install:lab && npm --prefix lab run build && rm -rf public/lab && mkdir -p public/lab && cp -R lab/dist/. public/lab/
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy public --project-name=undef-logos --branch=main
scripts.test:lab: npm run install:lab && npm --prefix lab run test:run
scripts.typecheck:lab: npm run install:lab && npm --prefix lab run typecheck
